title: ReCrafted
description: The unofficial sequel/remake that upgrades graphics, optimizes gameplay, and adds new features while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.
body:
![Modpack LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/530d5319bf597ed356079d671aa50fdced9db3ab.png)

**ReCrafted** is an heavy sized modpack with over 100 carefully selected Mods, Datapacks, Resource Packs and Shaders, designed to feel like a sequel/remake to the original game. It enhances the vanilla experience with stunning graphical updates, optimized performance, and a host of quality-of-life improvements. From remastered visuals to new ambient effects, updated world generation, and fresh structures, this modpack offers an enriched adventure that stays true to the core Minecraft feel.

# Content ⚙️

# Credits 📄
This modpack uses an All Rights Reserved license, I do not own any of the mods, data packs, shaders and resource packs (except for the Logo). They belong to their owners, were made by their respected developers, is not my decision on what you can and can't do with their mods, go visit the mod pages for more information.

**NOTES:**
1. This is not an actual Minecraft sequel but just a modpack that aims to give a similar feeling. 
2. The logo was made in Blockbench with the Minecraft Title Generator plugin.
3. Remember to always have fun
